arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Club Brugge – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City must beat Club Brugge tonight to avoid a premature exit from the Champions League. The 2023 winners have endured an underwhelming European campaign which has seen them win only two of their seven games. January signings Omar Marmoush, Abdukodir Khusanov and Vitor Reis are all ineligible due to City not yet having the […] The post Manchester City vs Club Brugge – Match Preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Why Manchester City's New Signings Can't Play vs. Club Brugge
arts.sum: Manchester City's Omar Marmoush, Abdukodir Khusanov and Vitor Reis cannot play against Club Brugge due to UEFA restrictions.

arts.ttl: Man City to make ANOTHER massive bid TONIGHT
arts.sum: The offer will arrive on Wednesday evening after the conclusion of the final matchday of the Champions League group phase, with City hosting Club Brugge at home and Juventus welcoming Benfica to Turin. Manchester City will table a massive offer for Andrea Cambiaso on Wednesday evening at the conclusion of the night’s Champions League games.

arts.ttl: Man City's transfer spending is booming -- and there's more still to come
arts.sum: Man City had to do a U-turn on their usual transfer strategy to save their Premier League season, and the spending boom isn't slowing down just yet.

arts.ttl: Manchester City make loan offer to sign player – Guardiola’s presence tempting midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester City have been linked with a potential move for Juventus’ Douglas Luiz in the past few days. The midfielder was previously on the Citizens’ books for two years and spent a loan stint at Girona. arts.ttl: 'It's an opportunity' - what is at stake for Man City?
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola describes his side's Champions League situation as 'not a problem' but 'an opportunity' as they look to avoid exiting at the group stage.
